case_title: NANCY TAN VS. ELIZABETH ROSE RIEMAN et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TAN, NANCY AS TO DEFENDANT RIEMAN, ELIZABETH ROSE DOES 1 TO X SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAN, NANCY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIEMAN, ELIZABETH ROSE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1226 GRANT AVENUE, #5, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94133, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCPANTS OF THE PREMISES**
